articles.title: OpenAI, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL announce strategic content partnership
articles.summary: OpenAI partners with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL to bring trusted Brazilian journalism to ChatGPT, expanding access to news with attribution and transparency.

articles.title: How Virgin Atlantic ships faster with Codex
articles.summary: How Virgin Atlantic used Codex to ship its revamped mobile app on a fixed holiday travel deadline, reaching near-total unit test coverage and zero P1 defects.

articles.title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
articles.summary: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.

articles.title: AdventHealth advances whole-person care with OpenAI
articles.summary: AdventHealth is using ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline workflows, reduce administrative burden, and return more time to patient care.

articles.title: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex
articles.summary: How Ramp engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to review code and ship improvements, allowing them to get substantive feedback in minutes instead of hours.

articles.title: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
articles.summary: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.
